title: TMC crisis LIVE: Rebel leaders to seek ‘real TMC’ tag in meeting with Lok Sabha speaker; Shatrughan Sinha backs Mamata
description: TMC crisis LIVE updates: Twenty rebel MPs from the TMC will meet Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla on Monday to stake claim to be recognised as the "real TMC", rebel MP Jagadish Chandra Barma Basunia said on Friday.
